User-agent: *
Allow: /

Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /tmp/

# Block AI training crawlers that don't respect content
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://dingyaoadvisory.tw/sitemap.xml
